title: MCTR: Multi Camera Tracking Transformer
headline: 71.81 HOTA / 80.21 IDF1 / 91.19 MOTA on MMPTrack industry; 9 FPS
relation: Turns DETR-style E2E MOT into multi-camera tracking; strong rebuttal to heuristic-heavy pipelines.

title: GMT: Effective Global Framework for Multi-Camera Multi-Target Tracking
headline: Up to +21.3% CVMA / +17.2% CVIDF1 over prior two-stage frameworks
relation: Pushes the field from per-view trajectories to cross-view global trajectory objects.

title: ADA-Track
headline: 0.456 AMOTA on nuScenes test; beats STAR-Track and PF-Track
relation: Combines tracking-by-attention and tracking-by-detection; a pivotal query-based 3D tracker.

title: ADA-Track++
headline: 0.500 AMOTA on nuScenes test; +0.7 to +1.1 AMOTA over ADA-Track depending on detector
relation: Refines ADA-Track by making association itself more stable and less confused.

title: MCBLT: Multi-Camera Multi-Object 3D Tracking in Long Videos
headline: 81.22 HOTA on AI City 2024; 95.6 IDF1 on WILDTRACK
relation: Strong geometry-first long-horizon design; influential bridge between BEV perception and MTMC association.

title: All-Day Multi-Camera Multi-Target Tracking (ADMCMT + M3Track)
headline: Introduces first RGBT MCMT dataset M3Track; strong generalization across lighting conditions
relation: Adds the modality story the mostly-RGB literature lacked.

title: DepthTrack: Cluster Meets BEV for Multi-Camera Multi-Target 3D Tracking
association: Modular association with ReID and geometry
headline: 2nd place AI City 2025 Track 1; 63.14 HOTA
relation: Representative of high-performing geometry-first offline pipelines in synthetic/structured spaces.

title: Online 3D Multi-Camera Perception through Robust 2D Tracking and Depth-based Late Aggregation
headline: 3rd place AI City 2025 Track 1; 28.75 HOTA official challenge score
relation: A practical recipe for teams that already have strong 2D MTMC and want a 3D path without retraining everything.

title: A Unified 3D Object Perception Framework for Real-Time Outside-In Multi-Camera Systems
fusion: Early multi-view aggregation in shared world frame
headline: 45.22 HOTA on AI City 2025; best online camera-only result among reported systems
relation: Adapts Sparse4D from autonomous driving to fixed-camera infrastructure and shows the promise of query-memory systems.

title: CALIBFREE
headline: Reported +3% overall accuracy and +7.5 F1 on MMP-MvMHAT
relation: Promising direction for deployments where calibration is unavailable or drifts over time.

title: Dynamic Global Tracking (DGT)
association: Integrates cross-camera association into tracking loop
headline: IDF1 61.19 (speed) / 70.49 (performance) at 90 FPS on HST
relation: Strong example of deployment-oriented online global association.
